name: swarmui-promptenhance
description: Dev tooling for the PromptEnhance SwarmUI extension. Frontend/*.ts is the authoritative frontend source; the committed Assets/*.js SwarmUI serves is tsc build output validated by check:frontend-parity. The extension itself is a .NET project.

scripts.check:frontend-parity: tsc -p Frontend && git diff --exit-code -- Assets/contracts.js Assets/settings.js Assets/promptenhance.js
